metadata.title: Why the Average Particle Stops Behaving Classically
metadata.color_semantics: TEAL = narrow packet (follows classical force, expectation value = actual position); CRIMSON = wide packet (splits into two lobes, expectation value stranded at center)
metadata.note: Exclusions honored: no derivation of Ehrenfest equations, no Heisenberg-picture operator algebra, no V''' error-term math.
_variant_todo: rewrite every beat narration_text in the Teardown register (voices/teardown/VOICE.md + CLAUDE-BRAND.md) — voice only, facts unchanged
signature tangent 0-1 per video, ONLY on a clear opportunity (see SKILL)
swap the outro to the Claude outro from AUTHOR.MD :: NikBearBrown
then build audience-namespaced (audio in the new voice, scenes in the new palette)

source_of_truth: beat_sheet.json — edit the sheet, not this file
